meaning: n.米西奈斯,文学(艺术)的资助者
examples: Horace receives a sabine farm from maecenas.
Maecenas himself wrote both prose and verse, but only fragments survive.
Augustus' court, wife, daughter, descendants, ancestors, sister, Agrippa, kinsmen, intimates, friends, Areius, Maecenas, physicians and sacrificing priests - the whole court is dead.
Virgil and Horace enjoyed the bounty of Gaius Maecenas, and in return wrote poetic ad copy for Gaius' pal Caesar Augustus.
Maecenas purus pede, lacinia vitae, interdum ut, molestie id, lacus.
